patch.value: Verify remote telemetry stack receives events and data flows to Grafana

After the oversized-event pruning fix, the telemetry queue is draining correctly (60MB→4.5MB→clearing). Need to verify: (1) the remote stack at pm-cli.unbrained.dev is ingesting events properly, (2) Grafana dashboards show event counts, (3) Alloy/Loki/Tempo/Prometheus all receiving data, (4) RabbitMQ and Postgres processing events. Note: credentials must NOT be committed to git.
